title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Aparna Constructions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aparna Constructions has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aparna Constructions:
Aparna Constructions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aparna Constructions!
